title: Protein powder claw machine 💪
prompt_text: An energetic indoor scene, likely a gym or fitness event, focused on a large claw machine. The machine is filled to the brim with numerous white and black plastic tubs, resembling protein powder or supplement containers. Through the clear glass of the machine, a very muscular, bald man in a red tank top and black belt stands prominently in the background, intently watching the game unfold. Behind him, a diverse crowd of people, mostly in athletic wear, gathers to observe, some holding up phones to record. The lighting is bright, artificial, and evenly distributed across the scene.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: An energetic indoor scene, likely a gym or fitness event, focused on a large claw machine. The machine is filled to the brim with numerous white and black plastic tubs, resembling protein powder or supplement containers. Through the clear glass of the machine, a very muscular, bald man in a red tank top and black belt stands prominently in the background, intently watching the game unfold. Behind him, a diverse crowd of people, mostly in athletic wear, gathers to observe, some holding up phones to record. The lighting is bright, artificial, and evenly distributed across the scene.

cinematography.mood: Tense, exciting, and ultimately frustrated/disappointed, with an underlying sense of community and shared experience among the onlookers.
cinematography.cameraShot: A static, medium close-up shot, positioned as if looking from inside the claw machine through the glass, slightly angled up towards the man and the crowd. The claw mechanism is in the foreground, centered.

actions: The metal claw mechanism descends slowly into the pile of supplement tubs.
The claw closes firmly around a black tub.
The muscular man in the background watches with extreme focus, his mouth slightly open.
The claw begins to lift the secured black tub upwards.
The man in the background cheers, exclaiming 'Let's go!'
Suddenly, the black tub slips from the claw's grip and tumbles back down into the pile of other tubs.
The muscular man immediately reacts with an audible gasp, throwing his hands up in disbelief and frustration.
He expresses his anger and disappointment, gesturing towards the machine.
The crowd behind him also shows clear signs of disappointment and murmuring.
dialogue: A male voice says: "Come on, come on."
Another male voice shouts: "Clam it, clam it! Yes!"
The main muscular man exclaims: "Let's go!"
The main muscular man shouts in disbelief: "Oh! You kidding me?!"
Another male voice comments: "That's robbery, man."
The main muscular man yells angrily: "Trash claw! Trash!"
